Dell kicked off its Spring sale hot on the heels of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale event, and we tracked a bunch of solid deals on the brand’s Alienware gaming desktops and laptops. We’re tracking some notable deals on gaming monitors to upgrade your battlestation with a new display, and many of Razer’s peripherals also dipped to some of their lowest prices to date. You might also want to check out 8BitDo’s latest Retro68 50th Limited Edition keyboard, that just hit the scene. All that and more waiting for you in this week’s Battlestation Weekly.

more…

items.title: Electrified Weekly – Lectric April Showers e-bike sale with $720 savings, Jackery + EcoFlow Easter power station sales, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. Despite Amazon’s Big Spring Sale ending, we got a ton of great deals on eco-friendly tech from this week, like Lectric’s April Showers Sale that is taking up to $720 off e-bikes starting from $799, or the extended Segway e-scooter Spring Sale lasting through the weekend. Among the power station brands only Jackery is offering a full Easter Sale lineup with up to 54% discounts starting from $199, though we are getting an EcoFlow 72-hour Easter weekend flash sale that is taking up to 58% off three power stations and a solar panel starting from $284. We’ve also got notable tool deals like the rare EGO Power+ 3,200 PSI cordless electric pressure washer bundle back at its low, the EGO Z6 42-inch cordless electric zero-turn riding mower bundle with six batteries and a wall charger at a new low, and plenty more waiting for you below.

more…

items.title: 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – Cargo jogger pants $15, Nike Metcon 10 Shoes $70 off, more
items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – your virtual wardrobe of discounted apparel finds. From top-tier fashion houses and everyday pieces for your work week, right through to super affordable pickups to freshen up your essentials, every week we scour the interwebs for the best deals on footwear and clothing to ensure you never pay full price to update your closet game. Some of our popular apparel coverage includes cargo jogger pants down at $15 across loads of colorways, the Nike Metcon 10 Shoes at $70 off, and much more. Head below to see it all.
